name: Claude
description: Excels at long-context reasoning, nuanced writing, and autonomous coding tasks. Particularly strong for complex, multi-step agentic workflows and safety-conscious deployments.

soloFounder.justification: Top-tier agent capability means Claude can act as a full team member — drafting, coding, and reasoning autonomously with minimal supervision.

enterpriseScale.justification: Safety-focused design and enterprise agreements make Claude a reliable choice for organisations that need governed, high-stakes AI deployments.

rapidMvp.justification: Claude's code generation and reasoning speed allow founders to move from idea to working prototype in hours, not days.

contentPipeline.justification: Exceptional at long-form writing, editing, and tone consistency — ideal for scaling content without sacrificing quality.

researchStrategy.justification: Handles extremely long documents and complex multi-source reasoning, making it ideal for strategy synthesis and competitive analysis.

name: Gemini
description: Best-in-class for deep integration across Google's ecosystem (Docs, Sheets, Search, Maps). Ideal for organisations already working within Google Workspace.

enterpriseScale.justification: Unmatched Google Workspace integration and enterprise reliability make Gemini the natural choice for Google-first organisations at scale.

contentPipeline.justification: Native integration with Google Docs and Sheets lets teams build content pipelines directly inside tools they already use every day.

internalOps.justification: Deep Google Workspace connectivity enables powerful automation of internal processes — from Sheets-based reporting to Calendar and Gmail workflows.

researchStrategy.justification: Real-time Search grounding and broad data access make Gemini a strong partner for up-to-date market research and strategic intelligence.

name: Perplexity
description: Specialises in real-time, citation-backed research and web search. A strong choice when accuracy, source transparency, and up-to-date information are priorities.

soloFounder.justification: A solo founder's best research companion — delivers fast, cited answers that replace hours of manual searching and source verification.

contentPipeline.justification: Citation-backed research at speed means content teams can fact-check and source material in minutes rather than hours.

researchStrategy.justification: Purpose-built for research — every answer is grounded in live sources with citations, making it ideal for evidence-based strategy work.

name: ChatGPT
description: The most widely adopted AI assistant, with an extensive plugin and GPT ecosystem. Excellent for general-purpose tasks, content creation, and rapid prototyping.

soloFounder.justification: The largest ecosystem of plugins and custom GPTs means a solo founder can find a ready-made AI tool for almost any task without building from scratch.

enterpriseScale.justification: Enterprise tier offers SSO, audit logs, and admin controls alongside the broadest third-party integration ecosystem available.

rapidMvp.justification: Fastest time-to-useful output of any tool — no learning curve, massive community of prompts and templates, and strong code generation.

contentPipeline.justification: The go-to for content teams — versatile across formats, tones, and languages, with a rich library of community-built content workflows.

researchStrategy.justification: Broad world knowledge combined with strong reasoning and web browsing makes ChatGPT a reliable first-pass research and synthesis tool.

name: Cursor
description: An AI-native code editor that accelerates software development with inline suggestions, refactoring, and codebase-aware chat. Best suited for professional developers.

soloFounder.justification: A solo technical founder's force multiplier — Cursor understands your entire codebase and generates context-aware code, halving development time.

rapidMvp.justification: Codebase-aware suggestions and inline generation let developers ship MVP features significantly faster than with a standard editor.

name: n8n
description: A self-hostable workflow automation platform with the broadest range of integrations. Best for teams that need powerful, customisable automations without ongoing SaaS costs.

enterpriseScale.justification: Self-hosted deployment and 400+ integrations give enterprise teams full data sovereignty and the ability to automate any cross-system workflow.

contentPipeline.justification: Connect your CMS, social platforms, and AI tools into a single automated pipeline — publish, repurpose, and distribute content without manual steps.

internalOps.justification: The broadest integration library of any tool reviewed — ideal for stitching together internal systems and automating repetitive operational workflows.

name: MindStudio
description: A no-code builder for creating and deploying custom AI apps. Ideal for non-technical users who want to ship AI-powered tools quickly without writing any code.

soloFounder.justification: Build and deploy a custom AI product without writing a line of code — MindStudio is the fastest path from idea to shareable AI tool for non-technical founders.

rapidMvp.justification: No-code AI app builder with instant deployment — ideal for validating product ideas quickly without engineering resource.

internalOps.justification: Non-technical teams can build custom internal AI tools — from onboarding assistants to policy Q&A bots — without involving developers.

name: Replit
description: A browser-based coding environment with built-in AI assistance, hosting, and collaboration. Great for rapid prototyping, learning, and teams that want zero local setup.

soloFounder.justification: Code, host, and share a working product from the browser with no local setup — perfect for a solo founder who needs to move fast without DevOps overhead.

rapidMvp.justification: From blank canvas to live, shareable URL in minutes — Replit removes every infrastructure barrier between an idea and a working demo.

name: MS Power Apps
description: Enterprise-grade low-code app development deeply embedded in the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Best for organisations that need robust, governed applications connected to existing Microsoft infrastructure.

enterpriseScale.justification: Deep Microsoft 365 integration, enterprise governance, and 99.9% SLA reliability make Power Apps the default choice for Microsoft-first enterprises.

internalOps.justification: Native integration with SharePoint, Teams, Dynamics, and Azure makes Power Apps the most powerful internal ops platform for Microsoft-aligned organisations.

name: IBM watsonx
description: An enterprise AI platform built for regulated industries requiring governance, explainability, and data privacy. Strongest in large-scale deployments where compliance and auditability are non-negotiable.

enterpriseScale.justification: Designed from the ground up for regulated enterprise — offering explainable AI, full audit trails, and data residency controls that no other platform matches.

internalOps.justification: Trusted by large enterprises for automating complex internal processes where data privacy, auditability, and integration with legacy systems are critical.

researchStrategy.justification: Enterprise-grade data analysis and AI reasoning capabilities make watsonx the right tool for large organisations conducting deep strategic and market research.
